transcript.text:
[Pyeongyang Nengmyun] (North Korean Style Cold Noodles Mukbang from April)
I will not make this the first time I will be back later
[2nd try!]
[They even received the Michelin Guide]
Bon appetit!
[Can she give us a better review this time?]
A little bland and light
[Same words...]
[With beef bulgogi too?]
[Will she be able to do a better job?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Nonhyeon-dong today
[Cold Noodles Mukbang from April 5th]
It's my 2nd time trying it
Top tier Pyeongyang Nengmyun in Gangnam
I avoided the lunch hours

But it's still crowded
So they provided me with a separate area
Michelin Guide for 5 years in a row
I've been craving bulgogi too And they serve those here
I will have those 2 today
[Jinmi Pyeongyang Nengmyun] [Seoul, Gangnam-gu]
This is the main restaurant
But it's still very crowded
So I'll be going to this separated area
[Let's go!]
Up to how many servings can fit in 1 plate?
Like 4 servings?
[Are you eating that much?]
Then should I order 1 of everything?
4 servings of bulgogi,
half boiled pork, half boiled beef,

1 bibim nengmyun, (spicy cold noodles)
1 regular nengmyun, (with broth)
-How are the dumplings? -They're good too
I'll take that too, please
[Pyeongyang Nengmyun] (North Korean Style Cold Noodles)
[2 styles of boiled meat]
[Bulgogi] (Soy sauce marinated beef]
[And dumplings]
[How will she eat it all...]
It's all here
Looks great Bulgogi especially
It's one of my favorite dishes And it's been a long time
Onions like this
This is going to be great
[Pour the broth here]
About this much for now

Bon appetit
The main cold noodles first
Boiled eggs first Before the yolk drips out
The noodles are rolled up
Very clear broth
This one first
Wait, some soup
Wait...
Delicious
I don't know if it's because I always go to good restaurants
But this is my 2nd time trying it
People said it can taste weird at first
But this tastes right for me
It's good
I was worried because I really enjoy eating strong and salty flavors
This looks scrumptious

I love how quickly it cooks too
The broth
The seasoning is very light
A little bit of seasoning
It's almost gone already
Like a very clean and light broth with barely any seasoning
But you can taste the deep meat flavors
How do I explain this?
I'll think about it while I eat the bulgogi
I've been craving bulgogi served just like this
Push them out
Let's get a bite Been craving it so much
This is exactly what I wanted
In that sweet broth
Not too sweet
The broth is really good

Lovely This calls for some rice
I love it
A bite of the dumplings
It looks handmade So big
Soy sauce
It's pretty bland when you eat it at first
It's chewy almost like a hand-pulled dough
The thickness is just about right
I would highly recommend this to those who can't eat Pyeongyang Nengmyun
Sweet & sour
Perfectly seasoned
Boiled pork looks great too
They give you a good amount too
With ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
So tender
It's really soft

Chewy and it melts in your mouth
This boiled beef I thought it was something I'm familiar with
But it looks different
Tastes different too
It's because this one is beef
Green onion soy sauce
That's so good
I would pick pork if I had to
But this is also very good It's so savory
Put this over here
Such a great combination
I don't know what to eat because everything is going away so fast
Some boiled pork
It smells great too
Dumplings
With lots of soy sauce

I was alone, but customers are starting to come in
Some coke
Eating this with boiled pork would be amazing
Spicy noodles with meat is the way to go
Should I try this?
What's this?
I've always wondered
The meat they use inside the cold noodles are not for me
I don't like those dry and cold meats
But this is good
It's chewy
Some fresh kimchi with boiled pork
Delicious
Turn the fire up
[More bulgogi]
Eating these together is amazing

This is not that spicy
Lettuce leaves
A lot of bulgogi
It's hot it's hot it's hot it's hot
Bulgogi and radish
I want to cool these down somewhere
I can heat up the dumplings and also season them
Boiled pork too
Boiled beef too
You need to strategize well to balance out everything
Some bulgogi first since there's a lot
And you can drop the bulgogi in here
[In here...?]
The clean-tasting broth has been attacked
This lost its purpose now It's all washed out
It tastes the same

But it's warm So it tastes better
It tastes better warm
Before the noodles get soggy
Chewy but it's soft
The outside is a big rough
Some soup
The one with broth needs to be eaten first
If you do the opposite, your taste buds will get weird
Dip it here
Eating this warm is the best
Put all of them
I'm mixing a lot of stuff in this broth today...
This is like the North Korean Style Stew
Dumplings Warm dumplings
It's like North Korean dumplings
It's only my 2nd time trying North Korean cold noodles

But I can kinda relate why people crave and hunt for these
The broth tastes different
And I feel like all of them have their own unique taste
You can get more flavors if you eat it with the soup
I've failed to balance the food out this time
Let's cool these down
Let's finish the dumplings
I feel like eating these colder taste better
Cold dumplings are better
The temperature lets you taste the meat more
These are better warm
And it's much more tender
Yummy
I don't mean to do it, but I always end up eating the meat slices vertically
The side of my mouth gets messy if I eat it horizontally
All the seats are filling up because it's almost dinner time

So I'll need to hurry and leave
Bulgogi on top of dumplings
Wait, can I do this?
[I can]
Boiled pork bulgogi
[Finished]
Where should I go for the next Pyeongyang Nengmyun place?
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
